title: Log in and reach the dashboard
description: Verifies an existing user can log in with valid credentials and reach the authenticated dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Register a new account and land on the dashboard
description: Verifies a visitor can register with valid details and is redirected to the authenticated dashboard on success.

steps.description: Fill User One into the name field
Fill user.one@example.com into the email field
Fill ValidPass123! into the password field
Fill ValidPass123! into the confirm password field
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Log out from dashboard and lose access to protected pages
description: Verifies an authenticated user can log out from the account menu and is subsequently blocked from accessing the dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user is redirected to an authentication screen or otherwise blocked from viewing the dashboard

title: Create a post and see it appear at the top of the global feed
description: Verifies an authenticated user can create a new post from the dashboard and the new post appears at the top of the feed.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill Post created by automated test into the new post field
Verify the newest post in the feed is displayed at the top

title: Block access to dashboard when unauthenticated
description: Verifies unauthenticated access to the dashboard is blocked and the user is redirected to log in.

steps.description: Verify the user is prompted to log in

title: Update profile name and email successfully
description: Verifies an authenticated user can update their profile name and email and sees a success confirmation.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to open profile settings
Fill "Test User Updated" into the name field
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Filter feed between My Posts and All posts
description: Verifies an authenticated user can switch to My Posts and back to All and the feed updates accordingly.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the My Posts filter tab
Verify the feed shows posts from multiple users

title: Change password successfully while logged in
description: Verifies an authenticated user can change their password and sees a success confirmation.

steps.description: Fill "Password Changer" into the name field
Fill "OldPassword123!" into the password confirmation field
Click the navigation link to open password settings
Fill "OldPassword123!" into the current password field
Fill "NewPassword123!" into the new password field
Fill "NewPassword123!" into the confirm new password field
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Switch to Dark theme applies immediately
description: Verifies an authenticated user can select the Dark theme and the UI updates immediately to the dark appearance.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to appearance settings
Verify the application is using the dark theme styling

title: Log in with Remember Me enabled
description: Verifies a user can enable Remember Me and successfully log in to the dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Switch to Light theme applies immediately
description: Verifies an authenticated user can select the Light theme and the UI updates immediately to the light appearance.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to appearance settings
Verify the application is using the light theme styling

title: Switch to System theme applies immediately
description: Verifies an authenticated user can select the System theme and the UI updates immediately to follow the system preference.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to appearance settings
Verify the application is using the system-following theme mode

title: Theme selection persists after page reload
description: Verifies that after selecting a theme, reloading the page keeps the chosen theme applied.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to appearance settings
Verify the application is still using the light theme styling

title: Password change shows error when current password is incorrect
description: Verifies the password settings form rejects an incorrect current password and shows a validation error without changing the password.

steps.description: Fill "Current PW Validator" into the name field
Fill "CorrectPassword123!" into the password confirmation field
Click the navigation link to open password settings
Fill "WrongPassword123!" into the current password field
Fill "NewPassword123!" into the new password field
Fill "NewPassword123!" into the confirm new password field
Verify a current password validation error is visible

title: Theme selection persists across route changes
description: Verifies that after selecting a theme, navigating to another page and back retains the chosen theme.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to appearance settings
Click the navigation link to the dashboard
Click the navigation link to appearance settings
Verify the application is still using the dark theme styling

title: Delete account with current password confirmation and lose access
description: Verifies a user can delete their account by confirming with the current password and is then blocked from accessing the dashboard.

steps.description: Fill "Delete Me" into the name field
Fill "Password123!" into the password confirmation field
Click the navigation link to open profile settings
Fill "Password123!" into the current password field in the confirmation dialog
Verify the user is redirected to an authentication screen or otherwise blocked from viewing the dashboard

title: Cancel account deletion from confirmation dialog
description: Verifies initiating account deletion can be safely canceled and the account remains accessible.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to open profile settings
Cancel the deletion in the confirmation dialog
Verify the profile settings page remains accessible and the account is not deleted

title: Switching themes multiple times ends in the final selected theme
description: Verifies that toggling between Light, Dark, and System results in the UI matching the last selected theme mode.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to appearance settings
Verify the application is using the system-following theme mode

title: Password change shows error when confirmation does not match
description: Verifies the password settings form shows a validation error when the new password and confirmation do not match.

steps.description: Fill "Mismatch Tester" into the name field
Fill "Password123!" into the password confirmation field
Click the navigation link to open password settings
Fill "Password123!" into the current password field
Fill "NewPassword123!" into the new password field
Fill "DifferentPassword123!" into the confirm new password field
Verify a password confirmation validation error is visible

title: Show error on invalid login credentials
description: Verifies the login form rejects incorrect credentials and shows an invalid-credentials error without authenticating the user.

steps.description: Fill invalid.user@example.com into the email field
Fill WrongPassword123! into the password field
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible
Verify the user remains on the login page

title: Show validation errors when registration fields are invalid
description: Verifies the registration form blocks submission with invalid inputs and shows validation errors while staying on the registration page.

steps.description: Fill User Invalid into the name field
Fill an invalid email into the email field
Fill ValidPass123! into the password field
Fill DifferentPass123! into the confirm password field
Verify the user remains on the registration page

title: Prevent creating an empty post
description: Verifies the dashboard prevents submitting an empty post and shows a validation error without adding a new post to the feed.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the new post without entering content
Verify a post validation error is visible

title: Prevent registration when required fields are missing
description: Verifies the registration form requires mandatory fields and shows validation errors when submitted incomplete.

steps.description: Fill user.missing@example.com into the email field
Verify the user remains on the registration page

title: Profile update blocks invalid email format
description: Verifies the profile form prevents saving when the email format is invalid and shows an inline validation error.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to open profile settings
Verify an email validation error is visible
